name: Vault Minerals Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$4.6000, stop A$3.6333, target A$5.0950 (0.51:1) — then trail it.
